topic: Determination of Forward and Futures Prices
title: Valuing Forward Contracts: What is the formula to calculate the forward price of...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: What is the formula to calculate the forward price of an asset?

options.text: The forward price of an asset is calculated using the formula F = S0e^(rT),
Difference between spot and futures prices

solution: The forward price of an asset is calculated using the formula F = S0e^(rT), where S0 is the current price, r is the risk-free interest rate, and T is the time to maturity.
